creator: gibbs@plutotech.com
text:
If this is a 2940AU, enable the "SCAM" feature in SCSI-Select and
your problem will go away.  Why this helps, I have no idea as I don't
have a 2940AU to play with yet.

--
Justin T. Gibbs

  FreeBSD: Turning PCs into workstations
